## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `chore: regenerate registry` — content-only update from `verse-mate-web` ingest
- [ ] `feat:` — new field on a type, new export, new helper
- [ ] `fix:` — bug in a hand-authored helper or type
- [ ] `docs:` — README / CONTRIBUTING / CHANGELOG only

## If this is a registry regen

- [ ] Generated by the latest `verse-mate-web/scripts/visuals-ingest/build_manifests.py`
- [ ] No hand edits to `src/registry.ts`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (or `chore:` — skip CHANGELOG)

## If this is a shape change (new field, new helper, removed export)

- [ ] `src/types.ts` updated
- [ ] `src/index.ts` exports updated
- [ ] Companion PR open in `verse-mate-web` updating `build_manifests.py` to emit the new field
- [ ] Companion PR open in `verse-mate-mobile` consuming the new field (or noted as a follow-up)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `### Features` / `### Breaking` entry added

## Test plan

- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` clean
- [ ] Spot-check one book's manifest in `src/registry.ts` renders correctly on web after consumers bump
